zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre於1430年10月28日出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾哈爾沃斯時，他的父親Reginald West35歲，母親Margaret Thorley34歲。他於1451年6月與Lady Catharine Hungerford在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1476年3月10日在英國素可布洛阿德沃特沃迪享年45歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾惠維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre于1430年10月28日出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾哈爾沃斯时，他的父亲Reginald West35岁，母亲Margaret Thorley34岁。他于1451年6月与Lady Catharine Hungerford在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1476年3月10日在英国素可布洛阿德沃特沃迪享年45岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾惠維爾。

nameMeanings.name: West
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Middle English, Middle High German west ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for someone who had migrated from further west.
Americanized form of Finnish Vesterinen: from the personal name Vesteri (a short form of Sylvester ) + the surname suffix -nen.

History: This name was brought to North America independently by many bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. Thomas West, 12th Baron De La Warre, was captain general of Virginia in 1610–11. The state of DE is named for him. One of the earliest permanent settlers was Francis West (1606–92), who came to Duxbury, MA, from Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, in or before 1638.

variants.name: Western
meanings: English: from Middle English westerne ‘western’, denoting ‘(the man from the) west’. Compare West and Wester .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Vestern, found in two places, a compound of vest ‘west’ + vin ‘meadow’, denoting a farm to the west.

variants.name: Sylvester
meanings: English and German: from the Middle English and Latin personal name Silvester ‘dweller in the forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘wood’). The name was borne by three popes, including a contemporary of Constantine the Great, and seems to have been first used in England by clerics.

variants.name: Westman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Birgit, Erik, Hilmer, Nels.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from (an altered form of) the elements väst ‘west’ + -man. It is also found in Finland.
Americanized form of German Westmann: variant of West , with the addition of Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre was born on 28 October 1430, in Harworth, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reginald West, was 35 and his mother, Margaret Thorley, was 34. He married Lady Catharine Hungerford in June 1451, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 March 1476, in Worthing, Broadwater, Sussex, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Wherwell, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre est né le 28 octobre 1430, à Harworth, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reginald West, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Thorley, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Lady Catharine Hungerford en juin 1451, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 mars 1476, à Worthing, Broadwater, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Wherwell, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre am 28. Oktober 1430 in Harworth, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald West 35 und seine Mutter Margaret Thorley 34. Er hat im Juni 1451 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Lady Catharine Hungerford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. März 1476 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Worthing, Broadwater, Sussex, England und wurde in Wherwell, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre è nato il il 28 ottobre 1430 nel Harworth, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Reginald West, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Thorley, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Lady Catharine Hungerford nel giugno 1451, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 marzo 1476, nel Worthing, Broadwater, Sussex, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Wherwell, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard West 7th Baron de la Warreが1430年10月28日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアハーウオルスで生まれた時，父Reginald Westは35歳，母Margaret Thorleyは34歳であった。1451年6月にイギリスイギリススセックスでLady Catharine Hungerfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1476年3月10日にイギリススセックスブロアドワターウオルスイングで45歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアウアーウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre(이)가 1430년 10월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 하워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald West(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Thorley(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1451년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Lady Catharine Hungerford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1476년 3월 10일 영국 수세스 브로드왓어 워스잉에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 화웰에 묻혔다.

pt.28 October 1430–10 March 1476: 28 de outubro de 1430–10 de março de 1476
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre nasceu em 28 de outubro de 1430, em Harworth, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald West, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Thorley, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catharine Hungerford em junho de 1451, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de março de 1476, em Worthing, Broadwater, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Wherwell, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre родился 28 октября 1430 г. в местности харворт, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reginald West было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Thorley, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catharine Hungerford июнь 1451 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 марта 1476 г. в местности вортинг, броадвэитир, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности уирвелл, хампшир, Англия.

es.28 October 1430–10 March 1476: 28 de octubre de 1430–10 de marzo de 1476
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre nació el 28 de octubre de 1430, en Harworth, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reginald West, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Thorley, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Lady Catharine Hungerford en junio de 1451, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1476, en Worthing, Broadwater, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Wherwell, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
